titleEn: To give or ask information about events and happenings

conceptExplanation.en: OF14 — To give or ask information about events and happenings. Source document SC102-2/14-2005F. Grammar taught: impersonal, question_formation. Vocabulary: the OF14 section of the PFL2 Lexique. 32 questions, all traceable to the PFL2 source (17 verbatim source activities + 15 from the OF14 Lexique).
conceptExplanation.fr: S’informer ou informer d’un événement. Document source SC102-2/14-2005F. Grammaire enseignée : impersonal, question_formation. Vocabulaire : section OF14 du Lexique PFL2.
